title: Doom iPhone code review
summary: I took some time away from programming something I hope will become a really good shmup and read the source code of Doom for iPhone. I was very interested in finding out how a pixel oriented engine made the transition to openGL. Here are my notes, as usual I got a bit carried away with the drawings.
content: I took some time away from programming something I hope will become a really good shmup and read the source code of Doom for iPhone.
